'''âth-r-l''' ('''katharal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nerdsnipe|nerdsnipe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nerdsnipe|nerdsnipe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-r-l
|-
! Lemma
| katharal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitharal|thitharal]] || [[word:jitharal|jitharal]] || [[word:shitharal|shitharal]] || [[word:kitharal|kitharal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutharal|thuthutharal]] || [[word:jujutharal|jujutharal]] || [[word:shushutharal|shushutharal]] || [[word:kukutharal|kukutharal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutharal|thutharal]] || [[word:jutharal|jutharal]] || [[word:shutharal|shutharal]] || [[word:kutharal|kutharal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutharal|thutharal]] || [[word:jutharal|jutharal]] || [[word:shutharal|shutharal]] || [[word:kutharal|kutharal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetharal|thetharal]] || [[word:jetharal|jetharal]] || [[word:shetharal|shetharal]] || [[word:ketharal|ketharal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotharal|thothotharal]] || [[word:jojotharal|jojotharal]] || [[word:shoshotharal|shoshotharal]] || [[word:kokotharal|kokotharal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotharal|thotharal]] || [[word:jotharal|jotharal]] || [[word:shotharal|shotharal]] || [[word:kotharal|kotharal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotharal|thotharal]] || [[word:jotharal|jotharal]] || [[word:shotharal|shotharal]] || [[word:kotharal|kotharal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtharal|thĂŠtharal]] || [[word:jĂŠtharal|jĂŠtharal]] || [[word:shĂŠtharal|shĂŠtharal]] || [[word:kĂŠtharal|kĂŠtharal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatharal|thathatharal]] || [[word:jajatharal|jajatharal]] || [[word:shashatharal|shashatharal]] || [[word:kakatharal|kakatharal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatharal|thatharal]] || [[word:jatharal|jatharal]] || [[word:shatharal|shatharal]] || [[word:katharal|katharal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatharal|thatharal]] || [[word:jatharal|jatharal]] || [[word:shatharal|shatharal]] || [[word:katharal|katharal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatharal|shatharal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatharal|goshatharal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatharal|gokishatharal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatharalnĂŒ|shatharalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatharalnknĂŒ|goshatharalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharalnĂŒ|gokishatharalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatharalshĂ«|shatharalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatharalnkshĂ«|goshatharalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatharalshĂ«|gokishatharalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharalro|shatharalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharalnkro|goshatharalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharalro|gokishatharalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharalmu|shatharalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharalnkmu|goshatharalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharalmu|gokishatharalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatharalsher|shatharalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatharalnksher|goshatharalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatharalsher|gokishatharalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatharalng|shatharalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatharalnkng|goshatharalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatharalng|gokishatharalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatharalya|shatharalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatharalnkya|goshatharalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatharalya|gokishatharalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatharalyam|shatharalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatharalnkyam|goshatharalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatharalyam|gokishatharalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharalnĂŒshĂ«|shatharalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatharalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatharalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharalnĂŒro|shatharalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharalnknĂŒro|goshatharalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharalnĂŒro|gokishatharalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharalnĂŒmu|shatharalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharalnknĂŒmu|goshatharalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharalnĂŒmu|gokishatharalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharalshĂ«nĂŒ|shatharalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatharalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatharalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharalshĂ«ro|shatharalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharalnkshĂ«ro|goshatharalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharalshĂ«ro|gokishatharalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharalshĂ«mu|shatharalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharalnkshĂ«mu|goshatharalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharalshĂ«mu|gokishatharalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharalronĂŒ|shatharalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharalnkronĂŒ|goshatharalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharalronĂŒ|gokishatharalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharalroshĂ«|shatharalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharalnkroshĂ«|goshatharalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharalroshĂ«|gokishatharalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharalromu|shatharalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharalnkromu|goshatharalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharalromu|gokishatharalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharalmunĂŒ|shatharalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharalnkmunĂŒ|goshatharalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharalmunĂŒ|gokishatharalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharalmushĂ«|shatharalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharalnkmushĂ«|goshatharalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharalmushĂ«|gokishatharalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharalmuro|shatharalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharalnkmuro|goshatharalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharalmuro|gokishatharalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|806ef69}}
